title: Simulate Interactions
content:
Simulate Interactions
Archive Deltas
Emit Next-Run Prompts

Seed World defines the initial metaformeme cluster, mythic framing, and wave parameters for a new world. Inputs: a short concept brief, intended media types, constraints from VISION and SYSTEM layers. Output: a WORLD-MYTH-SPEC artifact with core vocabulary and values.

Expand Entities grows characters, locations, timelines, and operational structures consistent with the seed. Inputs: seed spec, desired granularity, and target media. Output: WORLD-MYTH-INDEX-CHAR and related artifacts populating characters and relations.

Simulate Interactions runs narrative or operational scenarios within the world: story episodes, user journeys, or project sprints. It is governed by wave parameters and can be either speculative (prototyping) or reflective (replaying actual events).

Archive Deltas summarizes what changed during simulation, writing WORLD and STORY artifacts into $ARCHIVE_ROOT/worlds and $ARCHIVE_ROOT/characters. It also updates continuity indices.

Emit Next-Run Prompts constructs SEAL-aligned prompts for future AIs, instructing them how to continue waves, explore branches, or refactor material. These prompts are stored in $PROMPT_ROOT and referenced in $ARCHIVE_ROOT/meta.
